prompt_rules: world-map grassland variation tiles, not close-up village grass
include broad color drift, subtle plains texture, sparse flowers, worn patches, and regional palette variation
avoid a single repeated grass stamp or high-frequency checkerboard texture

prompt:
Create a seamless 512x512 pixel art ground tile sheet for the sacred interior of a Shinto shrine plateau in a top-down Japanese fantasy RPG. Layout: 4 columns x 4 rows, 16 frames total. All frames are seamless center-fill variations of the shrine ground surface — no edge transitions needed. The ground should feel: calm, maintained, sacred. Not wild field grass. Content: short clipped grass with very subtle stone paving hints between grass clumps — small flat stepping stones barely visible, fine gravel patches, tiny moss cushions. Low visual noise. No large flowers. No rice paddy elements. No mud. Subtle warm morning dew glistening on grass tips. Color palette: muted sage green #8ab87a, soft stone grey #c8c4b2, pale gold highlight #e8e0c0, cool moss shadow #4a6a3a. Frames 0-7: pure grass with minor variation in grass blade angle and density. Frames 8-11: grass with one or two flat stones visible. Frames 12-15: grass with slightly more gravel and moss texture. The tile must be seamless on all four edges. Style: crisp SNES-era pixel art, Ghibli-inspired Japanese sacred grove atmosphere, soft dappled light filtering through bamboo canopy above, golden-hour warmth. 512px total sheet (128px per frame), opaque, no transparency, no isometric perspective, no vanishing point, no UI, no text, no characters.
Avoid: no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos or likeness, no samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature in the sheet, no letter emblems, no modern text/watermark/UI.
Output: crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art with fine readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline, top-left light source, bright cheerful colors, solid #FF00FF magenta background filling all empty space, consistent identity and scale across frames.
